Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 160 

SR_SCRNG_BEFORE_DRNG_AFTR_CD 

LABEL: Did Screening Occur Before, During, or After the Visit 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Did screening occur before, during, or after the visit. 

LONG NAME: SR_SCRNG_BEFORE_DRNG_AFTR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 1 = Before clinical visit 
2 = During clinical visit 
3 = After clinical visit 
Missing
